complete_requires: all native roles licensed by Vocabulary Semantics Baseline 1.1
only the five declared bounded derived constructs used where needed
no undeclared or unrestricted hidden metalanguage
mutation suite detects every registered semantic mutation
partial_when: some commitments are represented but at least one required commitment is unresolved
behavior is preserved only under an undeclared semantic assumption
trace or output preservation is incomplete
unsupported_when: a required commitment cannot be licensed under Baseline 1.1
completion requires an additional derived construct or unrestricted payload language
the compiler can pass only by changing a frozen input
error_when: implementation failure prevents a scientific outcome

behavioral_failure.report: shortest counterexample and failed commitment classes

reproducibility.reproducible: three independently regenerated complete candidates with identical canonical outputs and source digests

comparison_rule: No superiority or ranking conclusion is permitted.
